applicant.title: Applicant Dashboard
applicant.welcome_message: Welcome to your dashboard. Here you can view and manage your payment requests.

manager.title: Manager Dashboard
manager.welcome_message: Welcome to your dashboard. Here you can verify payment requests submitted by your team.

approver.welcome_message: Welcome to your dashboard. Here you can make final approval decisions.

accounting.title: Accounting Dashboard
accounting.welcome_message: Welcome to your dashboard. Here you can process payments for approved requests.

admin.title: Admin Dashboard
admin.welcome_message: Welcome to your dashboard. Here you can manage users and system configuration.
